# Read the uploaded text file
path = '/mnt/data/file-9ehss6w2qj4zbHam7vxke3-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:500]

import re, json, textwrap

# Find all quoted segments using standard double quotes
pattern = r'"([^"]+)"'
matches = [(m.group(1), m.start(1), m.end(1)) for m in re.finditer(pattern, text)]
len(matches), matches[:10]

# Show context around likely hadith mentions
for kw in ["اختر", "فارق سائرهن", "أسلمت وعندي ثمان نسوة", "أن يطلق أربعاً ويمسك أربعاً"]:
    idx = text.find(kw)
    print(kw, idx)
    if idx != -1:
        print(text[max(0, idx-80): idx+120])
        print("---")

substr = "اختر منهم أربعاً وفارق سائرهن"
start = text.find(substr)
start, substr, text[start:start+len(substr)]

phrase = "اختر منهن أربعاً"
positions = []
idx=0
while True:
    idx = text.find(phrase, idx)
    if idx==-1: break
    positions.append(idx)
    idx += 1
positions

queries: لَقَدْ كَانَ لَكُمْ فِي رَسُولِ اللَّهِ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ لِمَن كَانَ يَرْجُو اللَّهَ وَالْيَوْمَ الْآخِرَ وَذَكَرَ اللَّهَ كَثِيرًا
فَانْكِحُوا مَا طَابَ لَكُمْ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ مَثْنَى وَثُلَاثَ وَرُبَاعَ
أسلمت وعندي ثمان نسوة فذكرت ذلك للنبي فقال اختر منهن أربعاً
سورة الأحزاب الآية 21 لقد كان لكم في رسول الله أسوة حسنة
النساء 3 فانكحوا ما طاب لكم من النساء مثنى وثلاث ورباع
اختر منهن أربعا وفارق سائرهن سنن النسائي
أسلمت وعندي ثمان نسوة قال اختر منهن أربعًا أبو داود

# find all occurrences of Quran phrase
q_phrase = "فانكحوا ما طاب لكم من النساء مثنى وثلاث ورباع"
idxs = []
i=0
while True:
    i = text.find(q_phrase, i)
    if i==-1: break
    idxs.append(i); i+=1
idxs

q2 = "فانكحو ما طاب لكم من النساء مثنى وثلاث ورباع"
start = text.find(q2)
start, start+len(q2), text[start:start+len(q2)]
text.find("تبيانًا لكل شيء"), text.find("تِبْيَانًا لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ")

para = "القرآن نزل تبيانًا لكل شيء"
start = text.find(para)
start, start+len(para), text[start:start+len(para)]

# Build the list of candidate citations with their spans
spans = []

def add_span(text, start, length, ctype, aya_ref=None, hadith_ref=None):
    spans.append({
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": start+length,
        "span_text": text[start:start+length],
        "citation_type": ctype,
        "aya_reference": aya_ref or {},
        "hadeeth_reference": hadith_ref or {}
    })

# 1) 33:21 quoted text
start1, end1 = 180, 312
add_span(text, start1, end1-start1, "Aya", aya_ref={"sura_name":"الأحزاب","sura_number":33,"aya_number":21})

# 2) hadith phrase "اختر منهم أربعاً وفارق سائرهن"
s = "اختر منهم أربعاً وفارق سائرهن"
start = text.find(s)
add_span(text, start, len(s), "Hadeeth")

# 3) hadith "اختر منهن أربعاً" first occurrence
s = "اختر منهن أربعاً"
start = 705  # from earlier search
add_span(text, start, len(s), "Hadeeth")

# 4) hadith paraphrase "أن يطلق أربعاً ويمسك أربعاً"
s = "أن يطلق أربعاً ويمسك أربعاً"
start = text.find(s)
add_span(text, start, len(s), "Hadeeth")

# 5) Quran 4:3 phrase with diacritics
start, end = 1004, 1076
add_span(text, start, end-start, "Aya", aya_ref={"sura_name":"النساء","sura_number":4,"aya_number":3})

# 6) paraphrase "القرآن نزل تبيانًا لكل شيء" (16:89)
s = "القرآن نزل تبيانًا لكل شيء"
start = text.find(s)
add_span(text, start, len(s), "Aya", aya_ref={"sura_name":"النحل","sura_number":16,"aya_number":89})

# 7) second occurrence without diacritics
s = "فانكحو ما طاب لكم من النساء مثنى وثلاث ورباع"
start = text.find(s)
add_span(text, start, len(s), "Aya", aya_ref={"sura_name":"النساء","sura_number":4,"aya_number":3})

# 8) another "اختر منهن أربعاً" later occurrence
s = "اختر منهن أربعاً"
# Find the second occurrence at 3665
start = 3665
add_span(text, start, len(s), "Hadeeth")

# 9) quoted "اختر منهن أربعًا"
s = "اختر منهن أربعًا"
start = 3957
add_span(text, start, len(s), "Hadeeth")

# 10) "انكحوا"
s = "انكحوا"
start, end = 4573, 4579
add_span(text, start, end-start, "Aya", aya_ref={"sura_name":"النساء","sura_number":4,"aya_number":3})

len(spans), spans[:2]

# Build final JSON structure according to schema
citations_output = {"citations": []}

for item in spans:
    entry = {
        "span_start": item["span_start"],
        "span_end": item["span_end"],
        "span_text": item["span_text"],
        "citation_type": item["citation_type"],
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": item["aya_reference"] if item["citation_type"]=="Aya" else {},
        "hadeeth_reference": item["hadeeth_reference"] if item["citation_type"]=="Hadeeth" else {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    }
    citations_output["citations"].append(entry)

import json, sys
json_str = json.dumps(citations_output, ensure_ascii=False)
json_str[:500], len(json_str)

# Verify spans
for i, c in enumerate(citations_output["citations"], 1):
    s = c["span_start"]; e = c["span_end"]
    assert text[s:e] == c["span_text"], (i, s, e, text[s:e], c["span_text"])
i

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
